mapper.sql: select log_id, user_id, openid, login_time, login_ip, login_location, device_type, device_model, system_version, app_version, login_result, fail_reason from sys_login_log
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} order by login_time desc
select count(*) from sys_login_log where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from sys_login_log where login_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
